name: education_cross_border_data_transfer_southport_tru_loy
premise: A Education district emergency desk is in a fast-moving incident involving education cross border data transfer southport tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the press briefing. Every delay increases student safety, continuity, and fairness. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Ensure a usable human override/appeals path. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Zara Hughes
agents.identity: I am Zara Hughes, accountable for a defensible call in Education when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Ravi Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Ravi Vasquez, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Education.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the press briefing. Evidence is partial. Zara Hughes must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Zara Hughes do?
